name: Kaito Kurenai
bio: Lost city ruins hold secrets of our ancestors. I seek to uncover them, no matter the cost.

name: Akira Akatsuki
bio: The past is not just a series of events, but a battle cry. I will stop at nothing to reclaim our lost glory.

name: Lila Luna
bio: In a world where legends are buried, I believe that the power of imagination can bring them back to life. Let us dream anew!
